title: eulophia granitica
intro: Eulophia granitica, also known as the granite orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. Eulophia granitica is known to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used to make herbal teas or tonics.
